rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HARRY SIMMS JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Court is to determine how to proceed. No hearing notes will be sent. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FIRST INITIAL AND LAST NAME. ***Until further notice, the Court strongly encourages remote appearances by video or telephone. Counsel and parties may appear by video or audio-only telephone through Zoom. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall. Review the Court's 6th Amended General Order which took effect on 07/21/2020 for more information. If counsel or any party appears in person, he or she should anticipate delays at the entrance to the courthouse and inside the courthouse. Masks must be worn at all times while in the courthouse and social distancing protocols will be strictly enforced, including inside the courtroom. Anyone making an in-person appearance must first familiarize themselves with the Court's current pandemic-related requirements and protocols by reviewing the Court's website at https://sfsuperiorcourt.org/.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SHAWNTE L. PACHECO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/9/20. (No earlier availability.) The petitioner (the person named in item 2 of the petition) is missing from item 8 of the petition. (Examiner mis-read the petition initially. The petitioner is not the sole heir but a nominee of the father.) The proposed order that was submitted is missing a chunk of text in items 4 and 5; a new, complete proposed order must be submitted. A SUPPLEMENT to the petition, signed and verified by the petitioner, must be filed to supplement item 8 of the petition with the name, relationship to the decedent, and the address of the petitioner. (An amending pleading requires notice, so please do NOT amend again. [CRC 7.53.]) (The room number at the court on the Notice of Petition to Administer Estate was also incomplete.) A courtesy copy of the supplement and the proposed order must be received by the Examiner by no later than 10/29/20.

Courtesy copies of the proof of publication and proof of service must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/6/20. rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOAN SASSO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/23/20. Barry Goldberg is missing from item 8 of the petition and did not receive notice. When second generation or more distant heirs are listed, the deceased ancestor through whom they take (or would have taken) shall be named and his or her date of death and relationship to the decedent shall be stated. [LRSF 14.26 D. and E.] Whose children are the niece and nephew? If a sibling of the decedent survived, he/she must be included in item 8 and must receive (or waive) notice. The Acknowledgment of Receipt of the Duties and Liabilities is incomplete: no telephone number.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DARLENE FULLER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/23/20. (No earlier availability.) No courtesy copies. No proposed order. No proof of publication. The petition caption is incomplete. Items 6 and of the petition appear to be incomplete. All courtesy copies, including of the supplement to the petition, signed and verified by the petitioner, providing the missing information in the petition, and a proposed order must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/12/20.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: ANNETTE JOHNS TAPIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues may include (but not limited to): No proposed orders have been provided; and no statement of the probable time of the petitioner's birth has been provided. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FIRST INITIAL AND LAST NAME. ***Until further notice, the Court strongly encourages remote appearances by video or telephone. Counsel and parties may appear by video or audio-only telephone through Zoom. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall. Review the Court's 6th Amended General Order which took effect on 07/21/2020 for more information. If counsel or any party appears in person, he or she should anticipate delays at the entrance to the courthouse and inside the courthouse. Masks must be worn at all times while in the courthouse and social distancing protocols will be strictly enforced, including inside the courtroom. Anyone making an in-person appearance must first familiarize themselves with the Court's current pandemic-related requirements and protocols by reviewing the Court's website at https://sfsuperiorcourt.org/.
